_meta.purpose: Lay-language translations used by patient_plain_brief_rendering. Each term has zh + en plain synonyms; renderer either replaces (preferred) or parenthesizes on first use. v1.5 P0-4.
_meta.source: docs/RETROSPECTIVE_v1.4_PT-EXAMPLE-A_run-20260525.md §3h F5 — 60+ untranslated medical terms identified in v1.4 patient_brief output.
_meta.extend: Add new entries when a Henry G-jargon gate violation surfaces. Never delete — old runs may still reference.

KRAS.zh: KRAS 基因 (决定肿瘤生长的一个关键开关)
KRAS.en: KRAS gene (a key switch driving tumor growth)

KRAS G12C.zh: KRAS 基因的一种特定变化 (有专门的靶向药)
KRAS G12C.en: a specific KRAS mutation (it has its own targeted drug)

mCRC.zh: 转移性结直肠癌 (已经扩散的肠癌)
mCRC.en: metastatic colorectal cancer (colorectal cancer that has spread)

MSS.zh: 微卫星稳定型 (一种基因稳定状态; 决定免疫治疗效果不大)
MSS.en: microsatellite-stable (a stability marker; means immunotherapy likely won't work as well)

pMMR.zh: 错配修复正常 (与 MSS 类似的稳定状态)
pMMR.en: mismatch-repair proficient (similar stable status as MSS)

HER2.zh: HER2 蛋白 (乳腺癌和胃癌常用的一个生长信号)
HER2.en: HER2 protein (a common growth signal in breast and gastric cancer)

PD-L1.zh: PD-L1 蛋白 (与免疫治疗效果相关的肿瘤指标)
PD-L1.en: PD-L1 protein (a tumor marker linked to immunotherapy response)

TMB.zh: 肿瘤突变负荷 (肿瘤里有多少基因变化的指标)
TMB.en: tumor mutational burden (how many gene changes the tumor has)

VAF.zh: 突变丰度 (这个基因变化在肿瘤里占多少)
VAF.en: variant allele frequency (how prevalent this mutation is in the tumor)

ORR.zh: 客观缓解率 (吃药后肿瘤明显缩小的患者比例)
ORR.en: objective response rate (the percentage of patients whose tumor visibly shrank)

mPFS.zh: 中位无进展生存期 (一半患者用药多久后病情才开始进展)
mPFS.en: median progression-free survival (how long until half of patients see progression)

mOS.zh: 中位总生存期 (一半患者从用药开始能活多久)
mOS.en: median overall survival (how long half of patients live from start of treatment)

HR.zh: 风险比 (新疗法相对旧疗法的相对风险, 小于 1 表示更好)
HR.en: hazard ratio (relative risk vs. the comparator; less than 1 is better)

CI.zh: 置信区间 (这个数字可能波动的范围)
CI.en: confidence interval (the range this number could fall within)

ctDNA.zh: 循环肿瘤 DNA (血液里抽到的肿瘤碎片, 用来跟踪疗效)
ctDNA.en: circulating tumor DNA (tumor fragments in the blood used to track response)

ADC.zh: 抗体偶联药物 (一种把化疗药精准送到肿瘤上的新药)
ADC.en: antibody-drug conjugate (a class of drugs that delivers chemo precisely to tumor cells)

TKI.zh: 酪氨酸激酶抑制剂 (一类口服靶向药)
TKI.en: tyrosine kinase inhibitor (a class of oral targeted drugs)

ICI.zh: 免疫检查点抑制剂 (常说的免疫治疗)
ICI.en: immune-checkpoint inhibitor (the common form of immunotherapy)

irAE.zh: 免疫相关不良反应 (免疫治疗时身体某些部位发炎的副作用)
irAE.en: immune-related adverse event (a side effect where immunotherapy causes inflammation)

FOLFOX.zh: FOLFOX 方案 (一套经典的化疗组合)

FOLFIRI.zh: FOLFIRI 方案 (另一套常用化疗组合)

log2FC.zh: 表达倍数变化 (基因在肿瘤里比正常组织高多少, 数字越大越高)
log2FC.en: log2 fold change (how much higher a gene is expressed in tumor vs normal — bigger means higher)

DerSimonian-Laird.zh: (一种把多份小型临床数据合并起来计算的方法)
DerSimonian-Laird.en: (a statistical method to pool results from multiple small trials)

I².zh: 异质性指标 (合并的不同数据之间差异多大, 大于 50% 表示差异较大)
I².en: heterogeneity index (how different the pooled studies are; >50% means notably different)

RECIST.zh: RECIST 评估 (国际通用的影像学疗效评价标准)
RECIST.en: RECIST assessment (the international standard for evaluating tumor response on imaging)

eGFR.zh: 肾小球滤过率 (肾功能指标, 数字越高越好)
eGFR.en: estimated glomerular filtration rate (a kidney function indicator; higher is better)

LVEF.zh: 左心室射血分数 (心脏泵血能力的指标, 正常 ≥ 55%)
LVEF.en: left ventricular ejection fraction (heart pumping ability; ≥ 55% is normal)

ECOG.zh: 体力状态评分 (0-4 分; 0 是完全自如, 4 是卧床)
ECOG.en: performance status score (0-4; 0 is fully active, 4 is bedridden)

NCCN.zh: 美国 NCCN 指南 (国际权威的癌症治疗规范)
NCCN.en: the NCCN guidelines (US-based authoritative cancer treatment standards)

CSCO.zh: 中国 CSCO 指南 (中国本土的癌症治疗规范)
CSCO.en: the CSCO guidelines (China's domestic cancer treatment standards)

NMPA.zh: 国家药监局 (中国的药品监管机构, 类似美国 FDA)
NMPA.en: China's National Medical Products Administration (the regulator, similar to US FDA)

EAP.zh: 扩展准入 (在药未正式上市前的特殊用药通道)
EAP.en: expanded access (a special pathway to use drugs before formal approval)

NGS.zh: 二代测序 (一次性检测肿瘤里很多基因的检查)
NGS.en: next-generation sequencing (a test that screens many tumor genes at once)

IHC.zh: 免疫组化染色 (病理科用来检测特定蛋白的染色检查)
IHC.en: immunohistochemistry (a pathology stain that checks for specific proteins)

RNF43.zh: RNF43 基因 (与抗 EGFR 治疗效果相关的一个基因)
RNF43.en: RNF43 gene (a gene linked to anti-EGFR therapy response)

TROP2.zh: TROP2 蛋白 (一种肿瘤标志物, 有专门的靶向药)
TROP2.en: TROP2 protein (a tumor marker with its own targeted drug)

Cox.zh: (一种生存数据的统计分析方法)
Cox.en: (a statistical method for analyzing survival data)
